title: Aged Crops
description: Aged Crops adds subtle particle effects to fully grown crops, bringing your Minecraft farms to life with visual charm.
body:
# **Aged Crops** 
enhances your farming experience by adding elegant particle effects to fully grown crops, making your fields feel alive and visually dynamic without altering core gameplay.

![Happy Villager Particles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c365b5f095fb034f39c310ae9bb6b4765a4eded5.jpeg)

_Sparkling effects for ripe crops, bringing farms to life!_

## **Features**

• ✨ **Crop Particle Effects** – Adds dynamic particles to fully grown crops.

• 🎨 **Customizable Particle Types** – Choose from any Minecraft particle.

• ⏱️ **Adjustable Spawn Interval** – Control how often particles appear.

• 📏 **Configurable Radius** – Set how far around you particles spawn.

• 🎮 **In-Game Config Menu** – Change settings instantly with a keybind.

• 🔄 **Automatic Crop Texture Scanning** – Ensures accurate particle placement.
